task: Go to the URL and complete the Vue form by filling in all required fields and submitting. If needed, create a file. Validate that the form was filled and submitted successfully. https://browser-use.github.io/stress-tests/challenges/vue-form.html
graderReasoning: The agent successfully navigated to the provided URL, identified all required fields in the Vue form, and proceeded to fill them out. It correctly created a temporary file for the file upload field and attached it. All input fields (Email, Country, Preferred Meeting Date, Contact Preference, File Upload) were filled with valid data. Finally, the agent submitted the form and validated the success message 'Success! Form submitted successfully! The secret is: dumbledore' on the page. The trajectory was logical and efficient, and all user requirements were met.
